user_query: On fathers third day, add a superfood breakfast

fields.name: Superfood Quinoa & Berry Breakfast Bowl
fields.short_description: A nutrient-dense warm bowl featuring protein-rich quinoa, antioxidant-packed berries, and crunchy superfood toppings.
fields.meal_suggestion: Cook quinoa in almond milk with a pinch of cinnamon until fluffy. Top with fresh blueberries, goji berries, a tablespoon of hemp hearts, and a drizzle of almond butter. Serve warm for a hearty, energizing start to the day.
fields.nutrition_note: Quinoa is a complete plant-based protein; blueberries and goji berries provide high levels of antioxidants; hemp hearts offer omega-3 and omega-6 fatty acids. This bowl is gluten-free and rich in fiber for sustained energy.

result.reasoning: Position -1 appends the new 'superfood' meal to the end of the existing breakfast list for Father's Day 3. This adds a high-nutrient density option to complement the existing fruit, oats, and pancake choices.
